IssueDef.label: infrastructure
IssueDef.description: Roads, railways, and the connections they create.

PreceptDef.label: required
PreceptDef.description:
We must build roads and railways to connect our settlements.

Successfully completing a road inspires our people:
 - Variable mood boost (+2 to +23 mood per road)
 - Higher quality roads and more tiles built increase the effect

Failing to do so is a mark of shame.

thoughtStageDescriptions.li: More than {DAYSSINCELASTROADTHRESHOLD} days since our last road was built
